summary: Comprehensive testing of Inventory Exceptions feature (iteration_68) - all tests passed. Backend: 21/21 pytest tests passed covering /exceptions endpoint, exception classification, filtering, sorting, and regression. Frontend: Exceptions tab visible, summary cards show correct counts (5 SHORT, 3 LOW, 5 Reorder, 8 No Incoming), exceptions table renders with all required columns, History/Supply action buttons work, clickable summary cards filter exceptions, all existing tabs continue to work.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking (same as previous iterations)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Exceptions feature fully tested. Endpoint: GET /api/inventory-ledger/exceptions (customer_id required, optional exception_type filter). Exception types: short (status=SHORT), low (status=LOW), reorder (in reorder recommendations with recommended_qty), no_incoming (SHORT/LOW with incoming=0). Multiple types can apply to one item. Summary counts computed before filter. Rows filtered by exception_type parameter. Sorted by available ascending. Frontend: Exceptions tab (data-testid='inv-tab-exceptions'), summary cards (inv-exc-card-{short|low|reorder|no_incoming}), table (inv-exceptions-table), history button (inv-exc-history-{i}), supply button (inv-exc-supply-{i}).
